name: MoneyLand Lending Group, LLC
description_short: MoneyLand Lending Group specializes in diverse mortgage products including FHA, VA, USDA, construction, foreign national, and non-QM investor loans with competitive rates and personalized service.
description_long:
MoneyLand Lending Group, LLC is a mortgage lender operating in Florida that positions itself as a comprehensive lending partner for homebuyers and real estate investors. The company is based in the Orlando area (7751 Kingspointe Pkwy) and markets itself through the website hectormreyes.com, using the tagline "We don't close loans, we create memories." The company appears to operate with a focus on personalized client relationships and tailored financial solutions.

The company offers a broad range of mortgage and lending products: FHA loans, VA loans, USDA loans, conventional mortgages, construction loans, foreign national loans (for non-residents purchasing property), investor loans (Non-QM products for those who don't qualify for traditional mortgages), and commercial real estate loans. They provide online calculators for FHA, mortgage, USDA, and VA loan estimation. The company emphasizes pre-approval services and documentation assistance throughout the application process.

MoneyLand Lending Group differentiates itself through claims of expertise in specialized loan categories, particularly foreign national and Non-QM investor loans that traditional lenders may not offer. They emphasize a streamlined process, experienced team members with local Florida market knowledge, and competitive interest rates. The website highlights personalized customer service and efficient loan processing as core competitive advantages.

A significant limitation is the lack of transparent lending criteria, interest rate displays, or verifiable licensing information on the public-facing website. The business appears to operate primarily through contact-based inquiries (phone: 407-663-3030, email: docs@moneytreefl.com) rather than transparent online application or rate quote systems. There is minimal independent verification of regulatory status, customer reviews, or complaint history available through the provided website content.
pros: Specializes in difficult-to-place loans including Foreign National mortgages and Non-QM investor loans
Offers multiple loan calculators (FHA, VA, USDA, conventional) for customer estimation
Claims competitive rates and favorable terms across diverse loan products
Provides comprehensive pre-approval and documents checklist to expedite processing
Serves first-time homebuyers with FHA/VA/USDA conventional options
Advertises streamlined and efficient application process to reduce approval time
Local market expertise specific to Florida real estate and regulations
cons: Website displays no current interest rates, APRs, or loan terms for comparison shopping
No independent verification of licensing, credentials, or regulatory compliance visible on website
Lacks customer testimonials, reviews, or documented closing history for verification
Business model requires contact-based quotes rather than transparent online rate shopping
Website domain (hectormreyes.com) does not match company name, suggesting potential rebranding or unclear business structure
best_for: First-time homebuyers seeking FHA, VA, or USDA loan products
Foreign nationals or non-residents seeking to purchase U.S. property
Real estate investors with unconventional income or credit profiles (Non-QM loans)
Homeowners planning construction or major renovation projects
diagnosis: MoneyLand Lending Group is best suited for borrowers seeking specialized mortgage products—particularly first-time homebuyers using government-backed loans or investors/foreign nationals with unconventional profiles that traditional lenders reject. The primary caveat is the lack of transparent rate disclosure and independent verification; prospective borrowers must contact the company directly for quotes and should verify licensing and complaint history independently before proceeding.
services: Construction loans for custom builds and renovations
Foreign National loans for non-resident property buyers
Non-QM investor loans for alternative credit profiles
Online loan calculators (FHA, VA, USDA, conventional)
Pre-approval documentation assistance and checklist services
Personalized loan consultation and advisory services
Competitive rate shopping and terms comparison
